title: German Cornmeal Empanadas with Salsa
description: A twist on traditional German pastries, filled with a Venezuelan cornmeal mixture and served with a fresh salsa.

ingredients.name: crumbly
ingredients.notes: such as crushed crackers or chopped nuts

ingredients.name: venezuelan
ingredients.notes: such as chopped cilantro or scallions

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together cornmeal, moist, crumbly, and venezuelan ingredients.
Divide dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on desired empanada size.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Place 1-2 tablespoons of the cornmeal mixture onto the center of each circle.
Fold dough in half and press edges to seal.
Bake empanadas for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Meanwhile, prepare salsa by combining diced tomatoes, onions, and cilantro.
Serve empanadas with salsa for dipping.
